message:
fix(mux): fix H264 hardware decode stall with Constrained Baseline SPS

VAAPI hardware decoders buffer frames indefinitely in a reorder buffer
when the SPS advertises Main Profile without bitstream_restriction flags,
even with optimizeForLatency:true. Fix by advertising Constrained Baseline
(profile_idc=66) in the SPS with max_num_reorder_frames=0, while keeping
Main Profile for actual VAAPI encoding (Constrained Baseline encoding is
broken on many GPUs). Also add raw frame buffering on the client to cache
H264 frames before gpuRenderer is ready, and reset frame_count on IDR.
